transcription.text: excuse me madam but have you ever tried soda burst oh yes I was the first on my block then you know that soda burst is the real ice cream soda that makes itself at home I just loved it and you know there's a big scoop of ice cream and lots of real soda fountain fizz it was delicious soda bursts are real hit at parties and a favorite for snacks too my grandson just loved it he couldn't get enough and it comes in your four favorite flavors all chocolate black and white strawberry and pineapple oh yes I remember it was so hard to decide how often do you buy soda burst madam well not too often it's kind of expensive well madam here's good news they've just lowered the prices of soda burst in both the two pack and the family pack of four Oh bless you my grandson will be so happy he's been brooding a lot soda burst now at new lower prices soda burst by bird's eye
